training_status: active in summer, less active in winter

benefits.description: Lost all desired weight; overshot weight goal at higher dose. Now on maintenance dose of 1mg/wk with no significant weight regain even during inactive winter

protocol_notes: Never exceeded 3.2mg; averaged under 2mg during weight loss phase. Currently on 1mg/wk maintenance. Plans to cycle off entirely for the summer when highly active, potentially returning in early winter. Mentions that glucagon aspect of Reta may require 5-6mg/wk. Lost weight without the glucagon aspect. Considering using Tirz in the future and reserving Reta if needed.
